title: helianthemum ovatum subsp. hirsutum
intro: Helianthemum ovatum subsp. hirsutum, also known as the hairy rockrose or prickly rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rockrose family (Cistaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum ovatum subsp. hirsutum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, while also supporting immune function and wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for various herbal remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
